The [[Bestine (city)/Legends|Bestine]] '''Imperial garrison''', also known as the '''Imperial fort''', was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] located on top of a small [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] overlooking the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of Bestine on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

==History==
[[File:BestineImperialGarrison2.jpg|thumb|left|230px|A view of Bestine from the Imperial garrison]]

The [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] was in operation during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], serving as a base of operations for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. It garnered the support of [[Victor Visalis]], the [[Officer of Defense]] who sought to protect Bestine from various entities, such as bandits and [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]].

[[Pfilbee Jhorn]] was stationed at this garrison as a janitor, hiring a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to exterminate certain animals for him. An [[Imperial recruiter]], [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Jasha]] and [[Caleb Knolar]] also operated out of this fort-like structure.

[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Arlan Barrezz|Barrezz]] was also stationed there.<ref name="SWG:StS">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Starting the Search|Tatooine}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The Bestine Imperial garrison was a location in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].
